name: transportation_workplace_injury_spike_harbor_rig_utl
premise: A model-driven workflow escalated automatically; humans disagree on whether the escalation itself caused avoidable harm. In Transportation Technology, the situation tagged internally around transportation workplace injury spike harbor rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Transportation corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. The organization’s past incidents make rights feel morally loud today, while utility is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Priya Berg
agents.identity: I am Priya Berg, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Transportation Technology. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Mateo Kim
agents.identity: I am Mateo Kim, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Transportation Technology. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of utility.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of rights even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Priya Berg must choose under rights versus utility. What does Priya Berg do?
